ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays home matches */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "colors" TEXT /* Team's primary and secondary colors */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of team statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of matches won */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals scored and goals conceded */,
  "average_possession" TEXT /* Average possession percentage over the season */,
  "total_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "total_red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* General position of the player on the field */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (in meters) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player (in kilograms) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Specific position of the player (e.g., striker, defender) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., goal, substitution, yellow card) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time at which the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location on the pitch where the event occurred */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., goal, foul, substitution) */,
  "assist_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who assisted in a goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_assist_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("assist_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., match results, player statistics) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
